title: Vīrudha-Āhāra Māraṇa — The Energetic Food Poison Curse
description: A specialised māraṇa text detailing the Vīrudha-Āhāra rite, an adversarial tantric procedure framed around energetic contamination of food. Included for scholarly and source-text preservation only. Not instructional; explicit caution flag set.
